_comment: Demo manifest for the three gist examples, checked against the real generated Python SDKs under tests/generated/azure. Items 1-2 have signatures (deterministic); item 3 (hierarchy) has none by default so it routes to AI — run with --signatures signatures.promoted.json to see it become deterministic.

items.verify: Dog is surfaced as a subtype of Pet (inherits Pet's members), not a direct subtype of Animal
